rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal — Iran deal stalemate continues with no energy relief, and distant geopolitical events have no meaningful impact on daily life in western Iberia.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran-US stalemate means no near-term reduction in global energy costs, keeping indirect pressure on Portuguese cost of living unchanged.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS jet plans collapse: European defense autonomy at risk
top_events.summary: The Franco-German fighter program failure is a distant EU-level concern for Portugal with minimal direct daily impact, but signals continued EU defense fragmentation.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes — a topic with some relevance to Portugal given shared Atlantic exposure and migration flows.
